---
title: "historic districts cleaning version 2 part 2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Packages
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# Importing pre-cleaned data
historic_districts <- read_csv("../data/Historic Districts/historic_districts_clean3_specific_addresses.csv")
```
```{r}
# Removing unnecessary columns
# And making the address more human-readable
historic_districts <- historic_districts %>% 
  select(-nhl_designated_date, # 99% NA
         -prefix, # 85% NA
         -park_name, # 98% NA
         -level_of_significance_international # they were all false
         ) %>% 
  mutate(address = paste(property_name, city, state, sep = ", "))
```

## Widening

```{r}
# Split into binary (0 for false 1 for true) for the areas of significance
historic_districts <- historic_districts %>% 
  mutate(aos = area_of_significance) 

library(fastDummies)
widened_historic_districts <- dummy_cols(
    historic_districts,
    select_columns = "aos",
    split = "; "
  )
```

```{r}
widened_historic_districts <- widened_historic_districts %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  select(-aos)
```


## Fixing the duplicates
listed_date max
Lore Historic District = Lore, Seth And Irwinton Historic District (Boundary Increase)
Additional Documentation
li, lii
 parentheses
 match state, county, city
 
```{r}
historic_districts_parentheses <- widened_historic_districts %>% 
  filter(str_detect(property_name, "\\(Boundary") | str_detect(property_name, "\\(Additional")) %>% 
  mutate(cleaned_name = str_remove(property_name, " \\(.*")) %>% 
  distinct(cleaned_name)
```
```{r}
widened_historic_districts_nodupes <- widened_historic_districts

for(i in 1:nrow(historic_districts_parentheses)){
  
  all_group <- widened_historic_districts %>% 
      filter(str_detect(property_name, historic_districts_parentheses[[i, "cleaned_name"]]))
  
  most_recent <- all_group %>% 
    slice_max(listed_date, n=1)
  
  to_drop <- anti_join(all_group, most_recent, by = "property_name")
  
  widened_historic_districts_nodupes <- anti_join(
    widened_historic_districts_nodupes, 
    to_drop, 
    by = "property_name") 
}
```

```{r}
# Fixing the names so that there's no boundary increase/decrease stuff
# Need to also fix the district_name (or remove lol)
widened_historic_districts_nodupes_clean <- widened_historic_districts_nodupes %>% 
  mutate(property_name = str_remove(property_name, "\\((Bound|Addit).*") %>% 
           str_trim(side = "right"))
```

```{r}
# Cleaning up some other stuff
widened_historic_districts_nodupes_clean <- widened_historic_districts_nodupes_clean %>% 
  mutate(
    address = paste(property_name, city, state, sep = ", "),
    district_name = str_remove(property_name, " Historic District")
  )
```


## Fixing the NA locations
```{r}
# Getting the simpler addresses + renaming these cols

library(tidygeocoder)
library(arcgisgeocode)

geocoded <- widened_historic_districts_nodupes_clean %>% 
  filter(!is.na(latitude))

needs_geocoding <- widened_historic_districts_nodupes_clean %>% 
  filter(is.na(latitude)) %>% 
  select(-latitude, -longitude) %>% 
  geocode(address = address, method = 'arcgis', lat = latitude, long = longitude)

final_historic_districts <- bind_rows(geocoded, needs_geocoding)


```

```{r}
write_csv(final_historic_districts, "historic_districts_clean4.csv")
```
